summary: Narrated USCIS PSA ("Need to register? Do it now") telling aliens they may need to register with the U.S. government under Trump's EO 14159. It uses stock B-roll (person typing on a laptop, a waving DHS "Semper Paratus 1790" flag, a classroom) with voiceover, white caption text, and an ARR logo/URL end card. Voiceover-driven informational promo with no music track or genre styling, so out of scope.
notable_text: with the U.S. government as an alien?; aliens register with the U.S. government; and you are 14 or older; If you are a parent; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
